meta.title: Jonathan Avila — Software Engineer · Backend, Fullstack & AI
meta.description: Professional portfolio of Jonathan Avila. Software Engineer focused on backend, fullstack and generative AI. Creator of Ciudadano Alerta, Sania, HelPet and MaxFind.

hero.name: Jonathan Avila
hero.tagline: 14+ years building software. Backend-focused, with strong fullstack range and generative AI in production: RAG architectures, LLM agents and serverless services on AWS.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a software engineer with 14+ years of experience (since 2012), focused on backend and with strong range across fullstack and AI engineering. I design scalable architectures and take generative AI from prototype to production: RAG systems, LLM agents and NLP pipelines in Python, obsessed with reliability, accuracy and cost at scale. I've delivered solutions in fintech, healthcare and regulated domains for clients like Coca-Cola Andina, Naranja X and AUNA, and I've founded and built my own products.
about.skillsHint: Everything starts from programming fundamentals at the center; from there my career branches fan out. Click a branch to focus it and hover each technology to see its detail.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.body: I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations. Drop me a line and I'll get back to you soon.
